creator: mgrooms@shrew.net
text:
Unfortunately I didn't try to boot 13 without the `debug.acpi.disabled=timer` work around using the llvm patched xen kernel. That would have been a good thing to test.

I was able to boot FreeBSD 14 without the `debug.acpi.disabled=timer` work around using the llvm patched xen kernel. Without the llvm patched xen kernel, I could not boot FreeBSD 14 with or without the `debug.acpi.disabled=timer` work around.
